records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be arriving at the operation zone shortly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be arriving at the operation zone shortly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be arriving at the operation zone shortly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The shortest distance to the target point from current coordinates is 5 km.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The shortest distance to the target point from current coordinates is 5 km.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The shortest distance to the target point from current coordinates is 5 km.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As per the briefing, we will escort you to that point with utmost dedication.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As per the briefing, we will escort you to that point with utmost dedication.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As per the briefing, we will escort you to that point with utmost dedication.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Roses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Roses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Roses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you hear me, Dr. Macy? We've arrived at the operation zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you hear me, Dr. Macy? We've arrived at the operation zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you hear me, Dr. Macy? We've arrived at the operation zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got your position on my end too, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got your position on my end too, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got your position on my end too, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just to be clear, the operation itself is simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just to be clear, the operation itself is simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just to be clear, the operation itself is simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are traces of dimension surface damage at specific coordinates of the perimeter zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are traces of dimension surface damage at specific coordinates of the perimeter zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are traces of dimension surface damage at specific coordinates of the perimeter zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's likely caused by someone forcing a dimensional rift between reality here and another world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's likely caused by someone forcing a dimensional rift between reality here and another world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's likely caused by someone forcing a dimensional rift between reality here and another world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our goal is to trace that rift and reverse-calculate the coordinates for a dive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our goal is to trace that rift and reverse-calculate the coordinates for a dive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our goal is to trace that rift and reverse-calculate the coordinates for a dive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this is about all the help we can offer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this is about all the help we can offer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this is about all the help we can offer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This space suit you made, Doctor...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This space suit you made, Doctor...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This space suit you made, Doctor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You called it a <color=#ffd34c>Single Diving Suit</color>, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You called it a <color=#ffd34c>Single Diving Suit</color>, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You called it a <color=#ffd34c>Single Diving Suit</color>, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure this suit alone lets us dive without a dimensional ship?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure this suit alone lets us dive without a dimensional ship?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure this suit alone lets us dive without a dimensional ship?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the first live test, but theoretically, it's perfect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the first live test, but theoretically, it's perfect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the first live test, but theoretically, it's perfect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Theoretically...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Theoretically...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Theoretically...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Artificial dimensional rift generation is already a standard tech.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Artificial dimensional rift generation is already a standard tech.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Artificial dimensional rift generation is already a standard tech.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the reason dimensional ships are still used is for their stability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the reason dimensional ships are still used is for their stability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the reason dimensional ships are still used is for their stability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because human bodies can't normally withstand the dive pressure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because human bodies can't normally withstand the dive pressure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because human bodies can't normally withstand the dive pressure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially not regular people like you, who are non-Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially not regular people like you, who are non-Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially not regular people like you, who are non-Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there are rare cases of naked-body dives succeeding...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there are rare cases of naked-body dives succeeding...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there are rare cases of naked-body dives succeeding...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that's just luck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that's just luck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that's just luck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And engineers don't count on luck, we make it real. That's our job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And engineers don't count on luck, we make it real. That's our job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And engineers don't count on luck, we make it real. That's our job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So can this suit withstand the pressure of a dimensional breach?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So can this suit withstand the pressure of a dimensional breach?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So can this suit withstand the pressure of a dimensional breach?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it can generate small-scale dimensional rifts on its own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it can generate small-scale dimensional rifts on its own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it can generate small-scale dimensional rifts on its own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, when breaking through the dimension, the external drive deploys a stasis field.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, when breaking through the dimension, the external drive deploys a stasis field.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, when breaking through the dimension, the external drive deploys a stasis field.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll reduce physical strain by over 90%.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll reduce physical strain by over 90%.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll reduce physical strain by over 90%.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meaning even regular people can operate for long periods in hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meaning even regular people can operate for long periods in hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meaning even regular people can operate for long periods in hyperdepths of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It also has built-in temperature control and some auto-repair capability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It also has built-in temperature control and some auto-repair capability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It also has built-in temperature control and some auto-repair capability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This hasn't been tested before, right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This hasn't been tested before, right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This hasn't been tested before, right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's with that scrawny face? You don't trust me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's with that scrawny face? You don't trust me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's with that scrawny face? You don't trust me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, that's not what I meant...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, that's not what I meant...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, that's not what I meant...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! You should be honored, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! You should be honored, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! You should be honored, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the first in Administration history to officially attempt a single dive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the first in Administration history to officially attempt a single dive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the first in Administration history to officially attempt a single dive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're witnessing cutting edge dive tech in real time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're witnessing cutting edge dive tech in real time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're witnessing cutting edge dive tech in real time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cutting edge or not, it's worthless if we die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cutting edge or not, it's worthless if we die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cutting edge or not, it's worthless if we die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't believe my first dive ever is gonna be through a rift, just trusting a space suit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't believe my first dive ever is gonna be through a rift, just trusting a space suit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't believe my first dive ever is gonna be through a rift, just trusting a space suit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That suit was modeled after a Counter with space-jumping abilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That suit was modeled after a Counter with space-jumping abilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That suit was modeled after a Counter with space-jumping abilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Counter with space-jumping abilities?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Counter with space-jumping abilities?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Counter with space-jumping abilities?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. She was someone very important to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. She was someone very important to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. She was someone very important to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since someone who never saw anything as impossible helped, we're bound to succeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since someone who never saw anything as impossible helped, we're bound to succeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since someone who never saw anything as impossible helped, we're bound to succeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'll make sure we don't fail no matter what...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'll make sure we don't fail no matter what...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'll make sure we don't fail no matter what...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, don't touch the suit's settings, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, don't touch the suit's settings, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, don't touch the suit's settings, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll control everything remotely, from inputting the coordinates to the dive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll control everything remotely, from inputting the coordinates to the dive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll control everything remotely, from inputting the coordinates to the dive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, Doctor, how do we get back once the mission's over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, Doctor, how do we get back once the mission's over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, Doctor, how do we get back once the mission's over?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't see anything about extraction in the briefing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't see anything about extraction in the briefing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't see anything about extraction in the briefing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's obvious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's obvious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's obvious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That suit's only designed to dive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That suit's only designed to dive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That suit's only designed to dive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With current tech, it's impossible to resurface back to higher dimensions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With current tech, it's impossible to resurface back to higher dimensions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With current tech, it's impossible to resurface back to higher dimensions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's nothing to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there's nothing to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's nothing to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tin Can has already calculated that someone would assist you once you hit the turning point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tin Can has already calculated that someone would assist you once you hit the turning point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tin Can has already calculated that someone would assist you once you hit the turning point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just meet up and return together once it's over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just meet up and return together once it's over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just meet up and return together once it's over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if the mission fails?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if the mission fails?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if the mission fails?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you asking the obvious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you asking the obvious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you asking the obvious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you die <color=#ffd34c>over there</color>, and we die <color=#ffd34c>over here</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you die <color=#ffd34c>over there</color>, and we die <color=#ffd34c>over here</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you die <color=#ffd34c>over there</color>, and we die <color=#ffd34c>over here</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Scraps is gonna wipe out humanity either way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Scraps is gonna wipe out humanity either way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Scraps is gonna wipe out humanity either way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What now, kid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What now, kid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What now, kid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were all fired up before. Are you just now getting scared?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were all fired up before. Are you just now getting scared?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were all fired up before. Are you just now getting scared?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you say you had to save your friend? If you're gonna back out, now's the time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you say you had to save your friend? If you're gonna back out, now's the time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you say you had to save your friend? If you're gonna back out, now's the time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who said anything about backing out...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who said anything about backing out...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who said anything about backing out...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait and see, Doctor. I'm going to pull this off and bring her home...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait and see, Doctor. I'm going to pull this off and bring her home...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait and see, Doctor. I'm going to pull this off and bring her home...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, what are you doing? Hurry up and get ready!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, what are you doing? Hurry up and get ready!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, what are you doing? Hurry up and get ready!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're almost there. Why are you dragging your feet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're almost there. Why are you dragging your feet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're almost there. Why are you dragging your feet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika? What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're seriously asking that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're seriously asking that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're seriously asking that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kid, you see this ridiculous getup and that's all you've got to say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kid, you see this ridiculous getup and that's all you've got to say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kid, you see this ridiculous getup and that's all you've got to say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Laika.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Laika.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Laika.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a grown woman. Why are you freaking out over a maid outfit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a grown woman. Why are you freaking out over a maid outfit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a grown woman. Why are you freaking out over a maid outfit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that different from your usual uniform.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that different from your usual uniform.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that different from your usual uniform.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Say that again with a straight face. I dare you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Say that again with a straight face. I dare you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Say that again with a straight face. I dare you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, rat-girl! You said this was a diving suit...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, rat-girl! You said this was a diving suit...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, rat-girl! You said this was a diving suit...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The kid's suit looks totally normal, but why is mine like this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The kid's suit looks totally normal, but why is mine like this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The kid's suit looks totally normal, but why is mine like this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did this on purpose, didn't you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did this on purpose, didn't you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did this on purpose, didn't you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you on about? You agreed to it, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you on about? You agreed to it, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you on about? You agreed to it, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you nuts?! When did I agree to this?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you nuts?! When did I agree to this?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you nuts?! When did I agree to this?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mansion Master said she'd design yours personally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mansion Master said she'd design yours personally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mansion Master said she'd design yours personally.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apparently, it's the Mansion's tradition for a maid's outfit to be tailored by her master or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apparently, it's the Mansion's tradition for a maid's outfit to be tailored by her master or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apparently, it's the Mansion's tradition for a maid's outfit to be tailored by her master or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have any idea how picky she was about every little frill and ribbon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have any idea how picky she was about every little frill and ribbon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have any idea how picky she was about every little frill and ribbon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She almost drove me insane!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She almost drove me insane!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She almost drove me insane!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-why that...! That perverted old hag...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-why that...! That perverted old hag...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-why that...! That perverted old hag...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... You finally look like a maid, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... You finally look like a maid, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... You finally look like a maid, Bristlegrass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Normally I prefer something more elegant and classical, but this suits you too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Normally I prefer something more elegant and classical, but this suits you too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Normally I prefer something more elegant and classical, but this suits you too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a shame I can't see it in person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a shame I can't see it in person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a shame I can't see it in person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You perverted old hag...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You perverted old hag...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You perverted old hag...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the heck is this outfit!?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the heck is this outfit!?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the heck is this outfit!?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't I say I'm not going back to Mansion?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't I say I'm not going back to Mansion?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I say I'm not going back to Mansion?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the Mansion's maid uniform represents trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the Mansion's maid uniform represents trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the Mansion's maid uniform represents trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You may have been just a trainee, but you did swear to become my maid, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You may have been just a trainee, but you did swear to become my maid, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You may have been just a trainee, but you did swear to become my maid, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you planning to break your vow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you planning to break your vow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you planning to break your vow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! That was ages ago...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! That was ages ago...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! That was ages ago...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long are you gonna keep bringing up some dumb promise I made as a kid?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long are you gonna keep bringing up some dumb promise I made as a kid?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long are you gonna keep bringing up some dumb promise I made as a kid?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I love that defiant look in your eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I love that defiant look in your eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I love that defiant look in your eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew from the start you were a weed no one could tame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew from the start you were a weed no one could tame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew from the start you were a weed no one could tame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it's a gardener's true joy to tame the untamable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it's a gardener's true joy to tame the untamable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it's a gardener's true joy to tame the untamable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I will tame you one day, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I will tame you one day, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I will tame you one day, Bristlegrass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No punishment, no brainwashing, no drugs. I just want to see you begging me on your own free will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No punishment, no brainwashing, no drugs. I just want to see you begging me on your own free will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No punishment, no brainwashing, no drugs. I just want to see you begging me on your own free will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to see you grovel like a dog, wag that invisible tail, and lick the soles of my boots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to see you grovel like a dog, wag that invisible tail, and lick the soles of my boots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to see you grovel like a dog, wag that invisible tail, and lick the soles of my boots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, just thinking of that moment excites me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, just thinking of that moment excites me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, just thinking of that moment excites me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, you twisted old hag...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, you twisted old hag...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, you twisted old hag...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm gonna lick your boots? Don't make me laugh! I'm not into that crap like you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm gonna lick your boots? Don't make me laugh! I'm not into that crap like you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm gonna lick your boots? Don't make me laugh! I'm not into that crap like you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just you wait! I'll burn that stupid Mansion to the ground someday...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just you wait! I'll burn that stupid Mansion to the ground someday...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just you wait! I'll burn that stupid Mansion to the ground someday...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha! Big dreams for a Bristlegrass!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha! Big dreams for a Bristlegrass!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha! Big dreams for a Bristlegrass!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go on then! I'd like to see you try.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go on then! I'd like to see you try.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go on then! I'd like to see you try.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is, if you make it back alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is, if you make it back alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is, if you make it back alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let me down this time, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let me down this time, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let me down this time, Bristlegrass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be waiting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be waiting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be waiting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ready, Laika?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ready, Laika?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ready, Laika?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The mothership...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The mothership...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The mothership...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Kudryavka, do you hear me?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Kudryavka, do you hear me?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Kudryavka, do you hear me?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>I repeat.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>I repeat.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>I repeat.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG:
<color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point
8g</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU:
<color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point
8g</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA:
<color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point
8g</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's about time I faced the rotten past I've been running from.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's about time I faced the rotten past I've been running from.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's about time I faced the rotten past I've been running from.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you start something, you gotta see it through. No matter how ugly it gets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you start something, you gotta see it through. No matter how ugly it gets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you start something, you gotta see it through. No matter how ugly it gets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So let's go out in a blaze of glory...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So let's go out in a blaze of glory...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So let's go out in a blaze of glory...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now entering the operation zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now entering the operation zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now entering the operation zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Black Rose Squad will escort you via the shortest route to target coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Black Rose Squad will escort you via the shortest route to target coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Black Rose Squad will escort you via the shortest route to target coordinates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be arriving at the operation zone shortly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be arriving at the operation zone shortly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be arriving at the operation zone shortly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The shortest distance to the target point from current coordinates is 5 km.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The shortest distance to the target point from current coordinates is 5 km.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The shortest distance to the target point from current coordinates is 5 km.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As per the briefing, we will escort you to that point with utmost dedication.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As per the briefing, we will escort you to that point with utmost dedication.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As per the briefing, we will escort you to that point with utmost dedication.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Roses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Roses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Roses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you hear me, Dr. Macy? We've arrived at the operation zone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you hear me, Dr. Macy? We've arrived at the operation zone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you hear me, Dr. Macy? We've arrived at the operation zone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got your position on my end too, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got your position on my end too, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got your position on my end too, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just to be clear, the operation itself is simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just to be clear, the operation itself is simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just to be clear, the operation itself is simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are traces of dimension surface damage at specific coordinates of the perimeter zone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are traces of dimension surface damage at specific coordinates of the perimeter zone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are traces of dimension surface damage at specific coordinates of the perimeter zone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's likely caused by someone forcing a dimensional rift between reality here and another world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's likely caused by someone forcing a dimensional rift between reality here and another world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's likely caused by someone forcing a dimensional rift between reality here and another world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our goal is to trace that rift and reverse-calculate the coordinates for a dive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our goal is to trace that rift and reverse-calculate the coordinates for a dive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our goal is to trace that rift and reverse-calculate the coordinates for a dive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this is about all the help we can offer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this is about all the help we can offer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this is about all the help we can offer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This space suit you made, Doctor...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This space suit you made, Doctor...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This space suit you made, Doctor...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You called it a <color=#ffd34c>Single Diving Suit</color>, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You called it a <color=#ffd34c>Single Diving Suit</color>, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You called it a <color=#ffd34c>Single Diving Suit</color>, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure this suit alone lets us dive without a dimensional ship?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure this suit alone lets us dive without a dimensional ship?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure this suit alone lets us dive without a dimensional ship?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the first live test, but theoretically, it's perfect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the first live test, but theoretically, it's perfect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the first live test, but theoretically, it's perfect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Theoretically...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Theoretically...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Theoretically...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Artificial dimensional rift generation is already a standard tech.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Artificial dimensional rift generation is already a standard tech.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Artificial dimensional rift generation is already a standard tech.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the reason dimensional ships are still used is for their stability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the reason dimensional ships are still used is for their stability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the reason dimensional ships are still used is for their stability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because human bodies can't normally withstand the dive pressure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because human bodies can't normally withstand the dive pressure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because human bodies can't normally withstand the dive pressure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Especially not regular people like you, who are non-Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Especially not regular people like you, who are non-Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Especially not regular people like you, who are non-Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there are rare cases of naked-body dives succeeding...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there are rare cases of naked-body dives succeeding...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there are rare cases of naked-body dives succeeding...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that's just luck.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that's just luck.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that's just luck.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And engineers don't count on luck, we make it real. That's our job.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And engineers don't count on luck, we make it real. That's our job.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And engineers don't count on luck, we make it real. That's our job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So can this suit withstand the pressure of a dimensional breach?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So can this suit withstand the pressure of a dimensional breach?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So can this suit withstand the pressure of a dimensional breach?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it can generate small-scale dimensional rifts on its own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it can generate small-scale dimensional rifts on its own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it can generate small-scale dimensional rifts on its own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, when breaking through the dimension, the external drive deploys a stasis field.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, when breaking through the dimension, the external drive deploys a stasis field.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, when breaking through the dimension, the external drive deploys a stasis field.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'll reduce physical strain by over 90%.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'll reduce physical strain by over 90%.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'll reduce physical strain by over 90%.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meaning even regular people can operate for long periods in hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meaning even regular people can operate for long periods in hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meaning even regular people can operate for long periods in hyperdepths of the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It also has built-in temperature control and some auto-repair capability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It also has built-in temperature control and some auto-repair capability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It also has built-in temperature control and some auto-repair capability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This hasn't been tested before, right...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This hasn't been tested before, right...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This hasn't been tested before, right...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's with that scrawny face? You don't trust me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's with that scrawny face? You don't trust me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's with that scrawny face? You don't trust me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, that's not what I meant...
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, that's not what I meant...
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, that's not what I meant...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! You should be honored, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! You should be honored, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! You should be honored, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the first in Administration history to officially attempt a single dive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the first in Administration history to officially attempt a single dive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the first in Administration history to officially attempt a single dive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're witnessing cutting edge dive tech in real time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're witnessing cutting edge dive tech in real time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're witnessing cutting edge dive tech in real time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cutting edge or not, it's worthless if we die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cutting edge or not, it's worthless if we die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cutting edge or not, it's worthless if we die!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't believe my first dive ever is gonna be through a rift, just trusting a space suit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't believe my first dive ever is gonna be through a rift, just trusting a space suit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't believe my first dive ever is gonna be through a rift, just trusting a space suit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly...
root.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly...
root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That suit was modeled after a Counter with space-jumping abilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That suit was modeled after a Counter with space-jumping abilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That suit was modeled after a Counter with space-jumping abilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Counter with space-jumping abilities?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Counter with space-jumping abilities?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Counter with space-jumping abilities?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. She was someone very important to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. She was someone very important to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. She was someone very important to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since someone who never saw anything as impossible helped, we're bound to succeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since someone who never saw anything as impossible helped, we're bound to succeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since someone who never saw anything as impossible helped, we're bound to succeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'll make sure we don't fail no matter what...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'll make sure we don't fail no matter what...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'll make sure we don't fail no matter what...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, don't touch the suit's settings, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, don't touch the suit's settings, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, don't touch the suit's settings, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll control everything remotely, from inputting the coordinates to the dive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll control everything remotely, from inputting the coordinates to the dive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll control everything remotely, from inputting the coordinates to the dive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, Doctor, how do we get back once the mission's over?
root.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, Doctor, how do we get back once the mission's over?
root.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, Doctor, how do we get back once the mission's over?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't see anything about extraction in the briefing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't see anything about extraction in the briefing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't see anything about extraction in the briefing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's obvious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's obvious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's obvious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That suit's only designed to dive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That suit's only designed to dive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That suit's only designed to dive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With current tech, it's impossible to resurface back to higher dimensions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With current tech, it's impossible to resurface back to higher dimensions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With current tech, it's impossible to resurface back to higher dimensions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there's nothing to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there's nothing to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there's nothing to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tin Can has already calculated that someone would assist you once you hit the turning point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tin Can has already calculated that someone would assist you once you hit the turning point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tin Can has already calculated that someone would assist you once you hit the turning point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just meet up and return together once it's over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just meet up and return together once it's over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just meet up and return together once it's over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if the mission fails?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if the mission fails?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if the mission fails?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you asking the obvious?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you asking the obvious?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you asking the obvious?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you die <color=#ffd34c>over there</color>, and we die <color=#ffd34c>over here</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then you die <color=#ffd34c>over there</color>, and we die <color=#ffd34c>over here</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then you die <color=#ffd34c>over there</color>, and we die <color=#ffd34c>over here</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Scraps is gonna wipe out humanity either way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Scraps is gonna wipe out humanity either way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Scraps is gonna wipe out humanity either way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What now, kid?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What now, kid?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What now, kid?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were all fired up before. Are you just now getting scared?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were all fired up before. Are you just now getting scared?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were all fired up before. Are you just now getting scared?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you say you had to save your friend? If you're gonna back out, now's the time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you say you had to save your friend? If you're gonna back out, now's the time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you say you had to save your friend? If you're gonna back out, now's the time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who said anything about backing out...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who said anything about backing out...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who said anything about backing out...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait and see, Doctor. I'm going to pull this off and bring her home...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait and see, Doctor. I'm going to pull this off and bring her home...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait and see, Doctor. I'm going to pull this off and bring her home...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, what are you doing? Hurry up and get ready!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, what are you doing? Hurry up and get ready!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, what are you doing? Hurry up and get ready!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're almost there. Why are you dragging your feet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're almost there. Why are you dragging your feet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're almost there. Why are you dragging your feet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika? What's wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika? What's wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're seriously asking that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're seriously asking that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're seriously asking that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kid, you see this ridiculous getup and that's all you've got to say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kid, you see this ridiculous getup and that's all you've got to say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kid, you see this ridiculous getup and that's all you've got to say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Laika.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Laika.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Laika.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a grown woman. Why are you freaking out over a maid outfit?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a grown woman. Why are you freaking out over a maid outfit?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a grown woman. Why are you freaking out over a maid outfit?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that different from your usual uniform.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that different from your usual uniform.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that different from your usual uniform.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Say that again with a straight face. I dare you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Say that again with a straight face. I dare you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Say that again with a straight face. I dare you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, rat-girl! You said this was a diving suit...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, rat-girl! You said this was a diving suit...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, rat-girl! You said this was a diving suit...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The kid's suit looks totally normal, but why is mine like this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The kid's suit looks totally normal, but why is mine like this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The kid's suit looks totally normal, but why is mine like this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did this on purpose, didn't you?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did this on purpose, didn't you?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did this on purpose, didn't you?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you on about? You agreed to it, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you on about? You agreed to it, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you on about? You agreed to it, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you nuts?! When did I agree to this?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you nuts?! When did I agree to this?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you nuts?! When did I agree to this?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mansion Master said she'd design yours personally.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mansion Master said she'd design yours personally.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mansion Master said she'd design yours personally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Apparently, it's the Mansion's tradition for a maid's outfit to be tailored by her master or something?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Apparently, it's the Mansion's tradition for a maid's outfit to be tailored by her master or something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Apparently, it's the Mansion's tradition for a maid's outfit to be tailored by her master or something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have any idea how picky she was about every little frill and ribbon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have any idea how picky she was about every little frill and ribbon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have any idea how picky she was about every little frill and ribbon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She almost drove me insane!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She almost drove me insane!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She almost drove me insane!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-why that...! That perverted old hag...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-why that...! That perverted old hag...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-why that...! That perverted old hag...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... You finally look like a maid, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... You finally look like a maid, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... You finally look like a maid, Bristlegrass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Normally I prefer something more elegant and classical, but this suits you too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Normally I prefer something more elegant and classical, but this suits you too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Normally I prefer something more elegant and classical, but this suits you too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a shame I can't see it in person.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a shame I can't see it in person.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a shame I can't see it in person.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You perverted old hag...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You perverted old hag...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You perverted old hag...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What the heck is this outfit!?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What the heck is this outfit!?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What the heck is this outfit!?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't I say I'm not going back to Mansion?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't I say I'm not going back to Mansion?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I say I'm not going back to Mansion?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the Mansion's maid uniform represents trust.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the Mansion's maid uniform represents trust.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the Mansion's maid uniform represents trust.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You may have been just a trainee, but you did swear to become my maid, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You may have been just a trainee, but you did swear to become my maid, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You may have been just a trainee, but you did swear to become my maid, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you planning to break your vow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you planning to break your vow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you planning to break your vow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! That was ages ago...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! That was ages ago...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! That was ages ago...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long are you gonna keep bringing up some dumb promise I made as a kid?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long are you gonna keep bringing up some dumb promise I made as a kid?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long are you gonna keep bringing up some dumb promise I made as a kid?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I love that defiant look in your eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I love that defiant look in your eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I love that defiant look in your eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew from the start you were a weed no one could tame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew from the start you were a weed no one could tame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew from the start you were a weed no one could tame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it's a gardener's true joy to tame the untamable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it's a gardener's true joy to tame the untamable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it's a gardener's true joy to tame the untamable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I will tame you one day, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I will tame you one day, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I will tame you one day, Bristlegrass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No punishment, no brainwashing, no drugs. I just want to see you begging me on your own free will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No punishment, no brainwashing, no drugs. I just want to see you begging me on your own free will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No punishment, no brainwashing, no drugs. I just want to see you begging me on your own free will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to see you grovel like a dog, wag that invisible tail, and lick the soles of my boots.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to see you grovel like a dog, wag that invisible tail, and lick the soles of my boots.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to see you grovel like a dog, wag that invisible tail, and lick the soles of my boots.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, just thinking of that moment excites me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, just thinking of that moment excites me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, just thinking of that moment excites me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, you twisted old hag...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, you twisted old hag...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, you twisted old hag...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm gonna lick your boots? Don't make me laugh! I'm not into that crap like you...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm gonna lick your boots? Don't make me laugh! I'm not into that crap like you...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm gonna lick your boots? Don't make me laugh! I'm not into that crap like you...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just you wait! I'll burn that stupid Mansion to the ground someday...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just you wait! I'll burn that stupid Mansion to the ground someday...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just you wait! I'll burn that stupid Mansion to the ground someday...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha! Big dreams for a Bristlegrass!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha! Big dreams for a Bristlegrass!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha! Big dreams for a Bristlegrass!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go on then! I'd like to see you try.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go on then! I'd like to see you try.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go on then! I'd like to see you try.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is, if you make it back alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is, if you make it back alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is, if you make it back alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let me down this time, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let me down this time, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let me down this time, Bristlegrass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be waiting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ready, Laika?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ready, Laika?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ready, Laika?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The mothership...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The mothership...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The mothership...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Kudryavka, do you hear me?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Kudryavka, do you hear me?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Kudryavka, do you hear me?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>I repeat.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>I repeat.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>I repeat.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG:
<color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point
8g</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU:
<color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point
8g</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA:
<color=#ff3636>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point
8g</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's about time I faced the rotten past I've been running from.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's about time I faced the rotten past I've been running from.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's about time I faced the rotten past I've been running from.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once you start something, you gotta see it through. No matter how ugly it gets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once you start something, you gotta see it through. No matter how ugly it gets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once you start something, you gotta see it through. No matter how ugly it gets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So let's go out in a blaze of glory...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So let's go out in a blaze of glory...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So let's go out in a blaze of glory...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now entering the operation zone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now entering the operation zone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now entering the operation zone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Black Rose Squad will escort you via the shortest route to target coordinates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Black Rose Squad will escort you via the shortest route to target coordinates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Black Rose Squad will escort you via the shortest route to target coordinates.
